identity.canonical_title: We Define DAAN Bio DAAN Which Relation

theory.canonical_statement: ID4512 records We Define DAAN Bio DAAN Which Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `0_Incoming\Manual_Uploads\TXT_20260224_182616\final_50-a7478c921b3d6672.txt` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: $. We define a functor \[ \Gamma_{\mathrm{DAAN}} \colon \mathcal{C}_{\mathrm{bio}} \to \mathcal{C}_{\mathrm{DAAN}} \] which on objects acts as a norm-preserving projection \[ P \colon \mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{bio}} \to \mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{DAAN}} \] with compression ratio $
canonical_equation.source_section_latex:
\[
$. We define a functor \[ \Gamma_{\mathrm{DAAN}} \colon \mathcal{C}_{\mathrm{bio}} \to \mathcal{C}_{\mathrm{DAAN}} \] which on objects acts as a norm-preserving projection \[ P \colon \mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{bio}} \to \mathcal{H}_{\mathrm{DAAN}} \] with compression ratio $
\]
